name: blog
description: Authenticated blog publishing with Markdown image uploads, preview, pagination, comments, author ownership, and admin management.

inject.text: { href: "/admin/blog", label: (t) => t.blog.nav, icon: NewspaperIcon, adminOnly: true },

### blog
- Public reads are paginated under `/blog`; authenticated users publish immediately and can manage their own posts and comments. Admins can manage all content under `/admin/blog`.
- Keep public route wrappers app-owned for visual design and SEO. Reusable types, loaders, editor, and API behavior live under managed `$lib/blog/` and `apps/api/src/blog/`.

instructions: Open /blog to read and write posts, attach images, or /admin/blog to manage all content.
After upgrading this package, run podo update and then podo update --apply.
